context_pointers.vague_reference: follow the same whitespace preservation rules as the YAML formatter
context_pointers.actual_meaning: Check the 'YAML Block Text Formatting' module to see if it preserves leading/trailing whitespace based on word boundaries, and replicate that logic.

context_pointers.vague_reference: use the same path patterns found in the project manifest generator
context_pointers.actual_meaning: Search the codebase for the 'manifest' or 'config' generation logic to find the standard relative paths (e.g., 'bin/') used for entry points, rather than hardcoding new paths.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_project_name_normalization.json.description: Directory names are converted into package-safe project names before being used in generated package metadata.

feature2_template_placeholder_rendering..description: Text templates replace placeholders whose names are made only of letters, leave unknown placeholders unchanged, do not recursively expand replacement values, and report invalid placeholder keys neutrally.

feature3_plain_text_wrapping.json.description: Plain text is split at spaces when it exceeds the configured column width, preserving short text as a single line.

feature4_yaml_block_text.json.description: Long description text rendered for YAML block fields is wrapped to the standard line width and each produced line is indented by two spaces.

input.text: one two three four five size seven eight nine ten eleven twelve thirteen fourteen fifteen

cases.expected_output:
one two three four five size seven eight nine ten eleven twelve thirteen
  fourteen fifteen

feature6_project_generation_summary.json.description: Generating a selected project template writes the expected number of relative files, identifies the intended entrypoint, includes common metadata files, and substitutes the project name into package metadata.

cases.expected_output:
template=console-full
project_name=foo
file_count=9
entrypoint=bin/main.dart
has_gitignore=present
has_pubspec=present
pubspec_name=foo
pubspec_version=0.0.1
pubspec_sdk='>=1.20.1 <2.0.0'
first_file=.gitignore
last_file=test/foo_test.dart

template=web-angular
project_name=foo
file_count=15
entrypoint=web/index.html
has_gitignore=present
has_pubspec=present
pubspec_name=foo
pubspec_version=0.0.1
pubspec_sdk='>=1.20.1 <2.0.0'
first_file=.gitignore
last_file=web/styles.css

feature7_command_line_behavior.json.description: The command-line interface reports help when invoked without a template, creates files for a valid template selector, reports invalid argument errors neutrally, emits a machine-readable catalog, and reports its version.

cases.expected_output:
status=error
error=invalid_template_selector
stdout_length=868
stderr_length=42
created_files=0
stdout_signal=usage
stderr_signal=invalid_template_selector

status=success
stdout_length=1029
stderr_length=0
created_files=0
machine_count=7
machine_first=console-full
machine_last=web-simple

_constraints.output_rule: Output exactly 'name=<normalized_name>'

_constraints.input_condition: input.directory_name ends with a file extension
_constraints.output_rule: Strip the file extension after the first period.
Replace hyphens with underscores.
Replace spaces with underscores.
Keep name as is (converted to snake_case from hyphens/spaces only).

_constraints.input_condition: input.text contains '__key__' and input.variables contains key
_constraints.output_rule: Replace '__key__' with input.variables[key]. Ensure no recursive expansion.

_constraints.input_condition: input.variables contains a valid key present in text placeholders
_constraints.output_rule: Leave unknown placeholders in text unchanged.

_constraints.input_condition: input.scenario === 'template_placeholder_rendering' and key contains non-letter characters
_constraints.output_rule: Output 'error=invalid_placeholder_key' followed by 'key=<original_key>'
Process replacement normally, ignoring invalid keys that don't stop execution.
Output 'line_count=1' followed by 'line_0=<full_text>'
Split text at spaces when line exceeds 'column' width.
Preserve leading/trailing whitespace only if part of the split word (not trimmed from line).
Wrap text to 80 characters. Prefix each line with '  ' (two spaces).
Output 'template_count=7', then list 7 templates in alphabetical order by template name.
Format: 'template=<name>', 'label=<text>', 'description=<text>', 'entrypoint=<path>', 'install=<step1>', 'install=<step2>'
Output metadata sorted by key: template, project_name, file_count, entrypoint, has_gitignore, has_pubspec, pubspec_name, pubspec_version, pubspec_sdk, first_file, last_file.
Render `__projectName__` in entrypoints or manifests.
Output 'error=unknown_template' followed by 'template_selector=<input_value>'
Output 'status=success', 'stdout_signal=usage', 'stdout_length=868', 'created_files=0', 'stderr_length=0'

_constraints.input_condition: arguments array contains one valid template name
_constraints.output_rule: Output 'status=success', 'created_files=<count>', 'stdout_signal=usage' (implied or explicit? spec says exit 0, output stdout length)', 'stderr=0'

_constraints.input_condition: arguments array contains one invalid template name
_constraints.output_rule: Output 'status=error', 'stdout_signal=usage', 'stderr_signal=invalid_template_selector'
Output 'status=success', 'machine_count=7', 'machine_first=<sorted first>', 'machine_last=<sorted last>'

_constraints.input_condition: arguments array has invalid selector OR too many positional arguments
_constraints.output_rule: Report neutral error category, do not create files.
JSON input maps to stdout lines. Lines must end with newline char.

_constraints.input_condition: Placeholder key contains digits, underscores, or symbols
_constraints.output_rule: Invalid. Trigger error output.
Verify file count matches expected: console-full=9, web-angular=15.
Detect entry point path: console-full='bin/main.dart', web-angular='web/index.html'.
